executive_summary: Analysis of 2 papers on on-device AI optimization techniques. Focus areas include quantization, pruning, and model compression with average relevance score of 92/100 and 1 high-impact papers.

takeaways.text: Quantization is essential for mobile deployment

sources.title: Efficient Mobile LLMs via Quantization
